title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

title: Tod Kar Dil Mera
desc: Raushni supports her husband's dream of becoming an IAS officer. However, will a betrayal change her life and aspirations?

title: Taara
desc: Taara, a gifted singer, and Yuvraaj, a wealthy heir, are bound by deep love. However, as class and family honour collide, the couple must confront relentless opposition to keep their love alive.

title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi
desc: Anjali Awasthi is a lawyer that struggles to achieve recognition in her field. But this desire to be recognised leads her to take on a challenging case that could help her achieve her dreams.

title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram
desc: Shivprasad lives a quiet life as a devoted husband and father, but he harbors a massive secret. Unknown to his family, he is also Parshuram, a highly skilled spy on dangerous missions.

title: Udne Ki Aasha
desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.

title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

title: Anupamaa
desc: Anupamaa, who parts with her ambitions and goals in a bid to raise her family, feels dejected when she fails to get any credit for her sacrifices and trials. She then decides to live on her own terms.

title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi
desc: Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.

title: Jhanak
desc: Jhanak tries to overcome her underprivileged background to fulfil her dream of becoming a dancer. However, a man she once rejected is out for revenge against her.

title: Diya Aur Baati Hum
desc: As Sandhya exits the examination hall, a bomb blast takes place in Pushkar. This leaves Bhabho worried, who tells the family that Sooraj may be at the site.
